topics.title: Environment Variables in GitLab
topics.description: The application can get environment variables stored from GitLab.

topics.title: Feature Flags in GitLab
topics.description: GitLab allows storing feature flags for different environments.

topics.title: Unleash Proxy
topics.description: The Unleash proxy is used to manage feature flags.

topics.title: Priority of Task
topics.description: The task is wanted but not the most important on the list.

topics.title: Otis Application
topics.description: Otis already does something similar for bookings and Oren application.

topics.title: Local MySQL Database
topics.description: The team is moving to a local MySQL database instance.

topics.title: Deployment Model with Argo CD
topics.description: Current OPM deployment model uses Argo CD and Helm charts.

topics.title: MySQL Dump for Seed Data
topics.description: A MySQL dump from a low-side path instance is available as seed data.

topics.title: Helm Charts for Application and MySQL
topics.description: Helm charts need to be created for the application and MySQL database.

topics.title: Libcharts for Similar Deployments
topics.description: Libcharts can be used for similar deployments like Otis and Bookings.

topics.title: MVP Timeline
topics.description: The team aims to have an MVP ready by the end of the fiscal year.

topics.title: IMTT Replacement
topics.description: Stakeholders and users have been wanting an IMT replacement for years.

topics.title: Team Experience
topics.description: The team is new to OPM, having joined in April of the current year and working on this project since July or December.

topics.title: Reusable Assets
topics.description: There are reusable assets that can be used, but they will need to be tweaked based on the app's needs.

topics.title: Build Status
topics.description: The build is in progress and needs to be pushed to the image registry once complete.

topics.title: Helm Charts and Config
topics.description: There will be two repositories for Helm charts and config, and a demo on Argo CD will be given once the app is stood up.

decisions.decision: Use libcharts for this application if it fits.
decisions.speaker: Speaker 1

decisions.decision: Get something up and running by the end of this week.
decisions.speaker: Speaker 1

decisions.decision: Show progress towards MVP in this FY
decisions.speaker: Speaker 2

decisions.decision: Use reusable assets but tweak them based on app needs
decisions.speaker: Speaker 1

questions.question: How familiar are you both with low-side paths?
Are you aware of anything that you will need, like any seed data, any users, anything like that?
questions.answer: Got a MySQL dump out of like the low side, one of the low side paths, process power instances.

questions.question: Do you know how simple or complex the template for the deployment needs to be?
When do you think you'd have capacity for that?
questions.answer: I can probably get something working by the end of tomorrow.

questions.question: Where do those things like live in GitLab world?
How's that build looking?
questions.answer: We kind of need one to run through and if it doesn't push then we need to look at the logs, but. At this point doing that until it has finished really.
